user.title: Latest News ID
user.description: Enter the latest known news ID to use as the starting point.

data_description.latest_news_id: Browse https://vikis.info and find the newest news article number (e.g. 606). The integration will scan for new IDs starting from this one.

poll_interval.title: Polling Interval
poll_interval.description: How often should the integration check for new news?

data_description.poll_interval: Default: 120 minutes (2 hours). News is usually posted a few times per week at most — no need to check more often than once per hour.

keywords.title: Priority Keywords
keywords.description: Optional: highlight specific news with a priority flag.

data_description.keywords: Comma-separated list of words or phrases. When a news title or description contains one of them, the item gets priority: true. Example: Vodovodna, Vrelo

max_news_items.title: Number of News Items to Store
max_news_items.description: How many news items to keep in the sensor?

data_description.max_news_items: Default: 20. Older items are automatically removed when new ones arrive. Increase this if you want more history on your dashboard.

data_description.latest_news_id: The latest known news ID. Scanning starts from this ID + 1.
data_description.poll_interval: How often to check for new news in minutes (default: 120).
data_description.keywords: Comma-separated keywords that flag news as priority.
data_description.max_news_items: Maximum number of news items to keep in the sensor state.
